protocol_application: Execute the complete registered protocol. This request supplies the independent held-out data scope and task-specific overrides only; inherit every unoverridden computational convention from the registered protocol.
precision: Do not round during calculation. Round every requested non-integer only in the final JSON to four decimal places.

publication_selection.health_rule: Within each year, county, and required measure, retain greatest (revision, released_at, observation_id), compared in that order. A retained suppressed or null row remains in the selected-row count but is incomplete.
publication_selection.socioeconomic_rule: Within each year and county, retain greatest (revision, released_at, record_id), compared in that order.
publication_selection.basic_complete_year: All three selected health rows exist, are unsuppressed, and have non-null values; the selected socioeconomic row has non-null poverty and median_income; and RUCC is non-null.
publication_selection.machine_learning_cohort: Primary cohort members whose selected 2024 socioeconomic row also has non-null bachelors, unemployment, net_migration, and uninsured.
publication_selection.ordering: Sort county rows by county_fips and states by state_abbr unless a module gives a more specific order.

shared_design.rucc: Fixed indicators RUCC=2,...,9 in that order, with RUCC=1 as reference.
shared_design.primary_total: Standard OLS total-effect model for depression with severe housing cost burden as exposure and poverty, scaled income, and the fixed RUCC indicators as covariates.
shared_design.primary_path_a: Standard OLS path-a model for short sleep with the same exposure and covariates as the total-effect model.
shared_design.primary_direct: Standard OLS direct-effect model for depression that adds short sleep to the total-effect specification.

mediation_sensitivity_surface.baseline: Use the 2024 primary OLS path-a housing coefficient, direct-model short-sleep coefficient, its classical OLS standard error, and the direct-model residual degrees of freedom.

controlled_conclusion.difference_gmm_supported: The stacked indirect 95% interval excludes zero.
controlled_conclusion.nested_ridge_supported: Augmented pooled RMSE is below base pooled RMSE and augmented RMSE is lower in at least 14 outer states.
controlled_conclusion.bootstrap_supported: Both PATH_A_HOUSING and PATH_B_SLEEP bootstrap p-values are below 0.05.
controlled_conclusion.grouped_conformal_calibrated: Overall coverage is at least 0.90 and at least 20 states have coverage at least 0.80.
controlled_conclusion.sensitivity_robust: Every POSITIVE surface row with both R2 values at most 0.10 has the same nonzero indirect-effect sign as the baseline indirect.
controlled_conclusion.trajectory_stable: Mean leave-one-year-out ARI is at least 0.60 and minimum ARI is at least 0.40.
classification_order: Return CONSISTENT_MULTI_SYSTEM_MEDIATION when all six flags are true.
Otherwise return PARTIAL_MULTI_SYSTEM_SUPPORT when at least four flags are true.
Otherwise return FRAGILE_MULTI_SYSTEM_SUPPORT when at least two flags are true.
